Footer.desc: HAUS Group helps families and investors find verified homes with clear pricing, local insight, and guided visits — from first search to keys in hand.

Footer.newsletterDesc: Market notes, viewing tips, and new listings — straight to your inbox.
Footer.disclaimerText: Property details, pricing, availability, and images on this website are for general information only and may change without notice. HAUS Group does not guarantee accuracy until verified by an advisor. Always confirm listing status, documents, and terms before making a decision.

AboutPage.title: Homes found with clarity, care, and local insight.
AboutPage.desc: HAUS Group helps families and investors shortlist the right properties using neighborhood knowledge, pricing context, and documentation checks — from first search to keys in hand.
AboutPage.desc2: Whether you are buying, renting, or listing, our advisors keep visits practical, numbers honest, and next steps easy to follow.
AboutPage.subtitle: Our approach
AboutPage.sideImageTitle: HAUS Group advisors reviewing a residence
AboutPage.philosophyTitle: Real options, clear numbers, reliable support.
AboutPage.philosophyDesc: We start by understanding your budget, timeline, and lifestyle. Then we shortlist verified homes, guide site visits, and stay with you through paperwork and handover.
AboutPage.missionTitle: Help every family move with confidence.
AboutPage.missionDesc: We exist to make buying, renting, and listing simpler — with verified options, honest numbers, and advisors who stay present from first call to keys in hand.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.desc: This policy explains how HAUS Group collects, uses, and protects personal information when you browse listings, book visits, or contact our advisors.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.desc: We may collect your name, email, phone number, preferred locations, budget, and messages you submit through enquiry or visit-request forms. We may also collect basic technical data such as browser type and pages viewed to improve the website.

sections.title: How we use your information
sections.desc: We use your details to respond to property enquiries, schedule site visits, share relevant listings, coordinate documentation support, and send updates you request. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.title: Property enquiries and site visits
sections.desc: When you request a visit or shortlist, your information may be shared with assigned HAUS Group advisors and, where needed, with property owners or partners solely to arrange viewings and follow-ups.

sections.title: Cookies and analytics
sections.desc: We may use cookies or similar tools to understand how visitors use the site, remember preferences, and improve performance. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.title: Data retention and security
sections.desc: We keep enquiry information only as long as needed for follow-up, legal, or service purposes. We take reasonable administrative and technical measures to protect your data from unauthorized access.

sections.title: Your choices
sections.desc: You may ask to review, update, or delete your contact details, or unsubscribe from marketing emails. Contact our team using the details in the footer or on the Contact page.

sections.title: Contact for privacy questions
sections.desc: For privacy-related requests, email our office or call the number listed in the footer. We will respond as promptly as possible.

TermsPage.title: Terms & Conditions
TermsPage.desc: These terms govern your use of the HAUS Group website and related property enquiry services. By using this site, you agree to the conditions below.

sections.title: Using this website
sections.desc: Content on this site is provided for general real estate information and enquiry purposes. Listings, prices, availability, and property details may change without notice and should be confirmed with an advisor before any decision.

sections.title: Property information
sections.desc: We work to present accurate listing details, but measurements, amenities, ownership documents, and pricing may vary. Always verify key facts during site visits and through formal documentation before purchase, rental, or investment.

sections.title: Enquiries and appointments
sections.desc: Submitting a form does not create a brokerage contract. Appointments, shortlists, and follow-ups are coordinated based on availability. HAUS Group may decline or reschedule requests when needed.

sections.title: No financial or legal advice
sections.desc: Nothing on this website is legal, tax, or mortgage advice. Buyers, renters, and sellers should seek independent professional advice for financing, contracts, and registration.

sections.title: User responsibilities
sections.desc: You agree to provide accurate contact details in forms and not to misuse the site, attempt unauthorized access, or submit harmful or misleading content.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.desc: Text, branding, layout, and media on this site belong to HAUS Group or its licensors. You may not copy or reuse them for commercial purposes without permission.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.desc: To the fullest extent permitted by law, HAUS Group is not liable for decisions made solely based on website content, third-party delays, or temporary service interruptions.

sections.title: Changes to these terms
sections.desc: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the website after changes means you accept the revised terms. The updated date above shows the latest revision.

Testimonial.title: Trusted by buyers, renters, and homeowners.
Testimonial.desc: Real feedback from people who found their next home with HAUS Group.

testimonialItems.name: Aarav Mehta
testimonialItems.quote: They shortlisted three strong options in a week and made every site visit feel clear and pressure-free.

testimonialItems.name: Neha Kapoor
testimonialItems.quote: Honest pricing, verified documents, and advisors who actually answered follow-up questions the same day.

testimonialItems.name: Rahul Verma
testimonialItems.quote: Neighborhood comps and rental potential were laid out simply — that made the decision much easier.

testimonialItems.name: Isha Malhotra
testimonialItems.quote: Listing support felt premium without being pushy. We closed with a serious buyer faster than expected.

testimonialItems.name: Kabir Anand
testimonialItems.quote: School catchments, commute times, and amenity checks were all part of the shortlist. Huge help.

testimonialItems.name: Sara Khan
testimonialItems.quote: From enquiry to registration, the process stayed organized and we always knew the next step.

FormDetail.title: Tell us what kind of home you need.
FormDetail.desc: Share your budget, location, and timeline so an advisor can respond.

faqItems.question: What are the steps to buy an apartment?
faqItems.answer: Start with a budget and location shortlist, book site visits, verify documents, secure financing, and complete registration with our advisor guiding each step.

faqItems.question: What documents do I need?
faqItems.answer: Typically ID proof, address proof, income documents for loans, and property papers such as title deed, tax receipts, and NOC where applicable.

faqItems.question: When is the best time to buy a house?
faqItems.answer: The best time depends on your finances, market conditions, and personal goals. Our team can help you compare seasonal trends and neighbourhood pricing.
